Requirement_Summary: Ensure accountability for compliance with POPIA conditions
Process personal information lawfully and reasonably
Collect personal information for specific, lawful purposes
Further processing must be compatible with original purpose
Ensure personal information is complete, accurate, not misleading
Take steps to ensure data subject is aware of information being collected
Secure personal information integrity and prevent loss, damage, or unauthorized access
Provide data subjects with access to their personal information
Obtain valid consent from data subjects where required
Ensure adequate protection for cross-border data transfers
Comply with direct marketing restrictions and opt-out mechanisms
Notify Information Regulator and data subjects of security breaches
Designate an Information Officer responsible for POPIA compliance
Conduct privacy impact assessments for high-risk processing
Retain personal information only as long as necessary, then destroy
